title: `README.md` is corrupted and does not document the package at all
reasoning: The README consists of an unrelated code fragment instead of package or project documentation. For a Node package root, that leaves contributors and release reviewers without basic context such as install/run commands, purpose, or environment setup, and strongly suggests the documentation file was accidentally overwritten or committed in a broken state.
recommendation: Replace the README with actual project documentation covering purpose, local development commands, required environment variables, and deployment/runtime notes relevant to this package.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: Documentation integrity is not exercised by the shown test or lint setup, so a corrupted README can persist unnoticed.
